cognito.userpool.customsmssender.CfnAbou: A custom SMS sender AWS Lambda trigger.

cognito.userpool.customsmssender.LambdaA.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Lambda function that Amazon Cognito triggers to send SMS notifications to users.

cognito.userpool.customsmssender.LambdaV.Description: The Lambda version represents the signature of the "request" attribute in the "event" information Amazon Cognito passes to your custom SMS sender Lambda function. The only supported value is `V1_0`.
